primary_variables.matched_definition: Comparison between disease and matched control cohorts.
evidence: we investigated in morning fasting plasma of heart failure (HF) patients the presence of pancreatic trypsin
Western analysis shows that trypsin in plasma is significantly elevated in HF compared to matched controls
The sample consisted of 60 American College of Cardiology/American Heart Association (ACC/AHA) Stage B and C HF patients and 55 individuals without HF.

primary_variables.matched_definition: Intervention using an agonist or activator that increases receptor, pathway, or signaling activity relative to control.
evidence: To identify serum-based protease products that would result from increased trypsin activity, an in vitro experiment was carried out were these proteases were incubated with human serum

Samples that served to test trypsin, chymotrypsin and elastase received 0.175 µg of trypsin (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Waltham, MA), 0.0875 µg of chymotrypsin (Promega, Madison, WI) and 0.0875 µg of elastase (Promega), respectively.

attributes.route_or_context: in vitro incubation with pooled normal human plasma
evidence: Samples that served to test trypsin, chymotrypsin and elastase received 0.175 µg of trypsin
All overnight incubation steps were at 37 °C for 20 h.

attributes.route_or_context: in vitro incubation with pooled normal human plasma
evidence: All overnight incubation steps were at 37 °C for 20 h.

evidence: All overnight incubation steps were at 37 °C for 20 h.

replicate_hints: two samples with added trypsin and overnight incubation
two trypsin and chymotrypsin samples with overnight incubation
two trypsin, chymotrypsin, and elastase samples with overnight incubation
multiplex_channel_hints: The hydrated samples were labeled (TMT10; Thermo Fisher Scientific) for one hour

evidence: Western analysis shows that trypsin in plasma is significantly elevated in HF compared to matched controls
The peptides that showed more than twofold increase from a non-protease treated control where tabulated

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The study uses DDA (data dependent scans) and explicitly mentions 'label free quantification analysis' using PEAKS Studio.
An in-vitro validation experiment specifically used TMT10 labeling.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The primary goal of the MS analysis was to identify 'endogenous free peptides' and 'protease cleavage events' (including trypsin and other degrading proteases) rather than standard in-vitro tryptic digestion of proteins.
